message:
conformance(io): expand FNP-P2C-009 corpus with parser/dispatch edge and hostile-budget cases

Broaden packet-009 IO fixture coverage by adding deterministic success paths,
metamorphic repeatability variants, and fail-closed adversarial budget/policy
checks for npy/npz dispatch and parser boundaries.

Differential additions:
- io_magic_version_v3_golden
- io_header_schema_fortran_i32_golden
- io_read_payload_bool_cube_golden
- io_load_dispatch_npy_golden
- io_load_dispatch_pickle_allowed_golden

Metamorphic additions:
- io_magic_version_idempotent_v1
- io_read_payload_repeatable_bool_cube
- io_dispatch_stability_pickle_allowed
- io_policy_metadata_idempotent_unknown_semantics

Adversarial additions:
- io_header_schema_zero_bytes
- io_memmap_retry_budget_exceeded
- io_npz_archive_member_count_zero
- io_policy_unknown_class_fail_closed

Validation run for this commit candidate:
- rch exec -- cargo test -p fnp-conformance io_ -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_test_contract_gate
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check
- UBS_MAX_DIR_SIZE_MB=0 ubs --diff

Key gate deltas:
- io_differential: 13/13 pass
- io_metamorphic: 10/10 pass
- io_adversarial: 12/12 pass
- test_contracts: 1772/1772 pass

Refs: bd-3ew6

files.patch:
@@ -123,5 +123,75 @@
     "reason_code": "io_policy_unknown_metadata",
     "mode_raw": "mystery_mode",
     "class_raw": "known_compatible_low_risk"
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "io_header_schema_zero_bytes",
+    "operation": "header_schema",
+    "expected_error_contains": "header bytes must be within bounded budget",
+    "expected_reason_code": "io_header_schema_invalid",
+    "severity": "high",
+    "seed": 909,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/contracts/security_control_checks_v1.yaml",
+      "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-009/contract_table.md"
+    ],
+    "reason_code": "io_header_schema_invalid",
+    "shape": [2, 2],
+    "fortran_order": false,
+    "dtype_descr": "<f8",
+    "header_len": 0
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "io_memmap_retry_budget_exceeded",
+    "operation": "memmap_contract",
+    "expected_error_contains": "memmap validation retries exceeded bounded budget",
+    "expected_reason_code": "io_memmap_contract_violation",
+    "severity": "high",
+    "seed": 910,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/contracts/security_control_checks_v1.yaml",
+      "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-009/contract_table.md"
+    ],
+    "reason_code": "io_memmap_contract_violation",
+    "memmap_mode": "r",
+    "dtype_descr": "<f8",
+    "file_len_bytes": 4096,
+    "expected_bytes": 1024,
+    "validation_retries": 65
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "io_npz_archive_member_count_zero",
+    "operation": "npz_archive_budget",
+    "expected_error_contains": "archive member count is outside bounded limits",
+    "expected_reason_code": "io_npz_archive_contract_violation",
+    "severity": "critical",
+    "seed": 911,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/contracts/security_control_checks_v1.yaml",
+      "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-009/contract_table.md"
+    ],
+    "reason_code": "io_npz_archive_contract_violation",
+    "member_count": 0,
+    "uncompressed_bytes": 1024,
+    "dispatch_retries": 0
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "io_policy_unknown_class_fail_closed",
+    "operation": "policy_metadata",
+    "expected_error_contains": "unknown mode/class metadata rejected fail-closed",
+    "expected_reason_code": "io_policy_unknown_metadata",
+    "severity": "critical",
+    "seed": 912,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/contracts/security_control_checks_v1.yaml",
+      "artifacts/contracts/hardened_mode_allowlist_v1.yaml"
+    ],

   }
